input_received.article_title: AI Agent Orchestration in 2026: The Enterprise Guide

api.deployment_fix: Repo pushed to JPeetz/SEO-API, Vercel auto-deployed. All 11 routes (6 SEO + 5 GEO) now serving 200.

entity_density.notes: Strong entity presence. 402 named entities across 3,163 words. 26 statistics with data-backed claims. 20 date references anchor content temporally. Citation marker count is 0 — could benefit from explicit 'according to'/'research shows' language.

strengths: 3 definition(s) — AI engines extract these directly
Conclusion marker present — good for AI summarisation
gaps: No direct answer patterns — add 'The answer is...' style sentences

topSentences.text: The key insight from production deployments: coordinating agents across monitoring, runbooks, and ticketing systems produces actionable recommendations 60x more frequently than single-agent approaches
But here is the reality check: 95% of AI initiatives still fail to reach production
Gartner reports that 40% of net-new enterprise applications will include task-specific AI agent capabilities by end of 2026

gaps: Add first-hand experience language ('I tested', 'we found', 'in our experience')
Add nuance and caveats ('however', 'it depends', 'note that') to build trust signals

scoring.verdict_detail: Composite 68 is below 75 cite-ready threshold. Three of four categories are strong (answer-structure 80, quotability 83, entity-density 62). E-E-A-T at 46 is the single blocker — specifically experience (15) and trust (10) signals. Article reads as authoritative third-party synthesis but lacks first-hand practitioner perspective.

escalation.reason: GEO composite 68/100 — above 40 needs-work floor, below 75 cite-ready ceiling. Single category (E-E-A-T) drags score. Article is publication-ready with note that E-E-A-T improvements would increase AI citation likelihood.

next_steps.action: Optional revision to boost E-E-A-T experience/trust signals — add first-hand pipeline language and caveats
next_steps.note: Not blocking publication — article is GEO-sufficient for current publishing

next_steps.action: Update pipeline protocol: GEO audit now automated via algorithmic API endpoints after SEO PASS

hive_mind_signal.content: GEO audit of 'AI Agent Orchestration in 2026' — composite 68/100 (needs-work). Three strong categories: Answer Structure 80 (excellent), Quotability 83 (strong), Entity Density 62 (good). Blocker: E-E-A-T 46 (moderate) — experience 15, trust 10. Article is publication-ready with optional E-E-A-T revision. API status: All 5 GEO endpoints now live at seo-api-nu.vercel.app after repo fix (JPeetz/SEO-API).
